# Windsurf Editor Changelog - Feature Announcements

## Version 1.9600.41 (April 7, 2026)
- Fixed bug preventing model switching after first request in Adaptive mode
- All affected users received quota resets and overage restoration

## Version 1.9600.40 (April 6, 2026)
- Improved visibility of the adaptive model option within the model picker interface

## Version 1.9600.38 (April 6, 2026)
- Introducing Adaptive: New model router that intelligently selects the best model for each task
- Available to all self-serve users on Pro, Max, and Teams plans
- Dynamically chooses the appropriate underlying model while maintaining fixed per-token quota consumption
- Updated Model Picker with token pricing display showing input, output, and cache read rates per model
- New prompt cache timer integrated into context window indicator
- Token counts included in response cards for cost transparency
- Extra usage promo pricing: $0.50/M input tokens, $2.00/M output tokens, $0.10/M cache read tokens

## Version 1.9577.43 (March 19, 2026)
- Introduced support for a new quota billing system
- Daily and weekly quota usage metrics now visible directly in the IDE
- Fixed Mac x64 build issues

## Version 1.9577.42 (March 19, 2026)
- Various bug fixes and performance enhancements

## Version 1.9577.27 (March 2026)
- GPT-5.4 Mini model availability

## Version 1.9577.24 (March 2026)
- Cascade improvements including Jupyter Notebook support
- SKILL.md file loading from `.windsurf/skills/` directory
- System-level skill definitions via MDM for Enterprise

## Version 1.9552.24 (March 2026)
- Plan Mode for task planning
- Arena Mode with side-by-side model comparison and personal/global leaderboards

## Version 1.9552.21 (February 2026)
- Gemini 3.1 Pro and Claude Sonnet 4.6 model releases
- GLM-5 and Minimax M2.5 model additions

## Version 1.9544.35 (February 2026)
- GPT-5.3-Codex-Spark in Arena Mode
- Claude Opus 4.6 and fast mode variants

## Wave 13 / v1.13.X (January-February 2026)
- Git worktree support
- Multi-Cascade panes and tabs
- Cascade dedicated terminal (beta)
- Context window indicator
- Cascade hooks
- System-level rules and workflows

## Version 1.13.9 (January 2026)
- Enterprise Group Policy management for Windsurf restrictions

## Version 1.13.8 (January 2026)
- GPT-5.2-Codex with four reasoning effort options

## Version 1.13.6 (January 2026)
- Agent Skills support for Cascade

## Version 1.13.5 (January 2026)
- Gemini 3 Flash model with multimodal capabilities

## Version 1.13.3 (December 2025)
- SWE-1.5 Free availability
- Git worktree and multi-Cascade pane support
- Cascade dedicated terminal
- Context window indicator

## Version 1.12.47 (December 2025)
- "Promo" label for newly available or discounted models

## Version 1.12.43 (December 2025)
- GPT-5.2 model release

## Version 1.12.41 (December 2025)
- Cascade hooks on user prompts for logging and policy enforcement
- GitLab remote MCP
- MCP prompt support
- OAuth for GitHub remote MCP
- MCP enable/disable toggles

## Version 1.12.39 (December 2025)
- GPT-5.1-Codex Max in three reasoning tiers

## Version 1.12.36 (December 2025)
- Claude Opus 4.5 model availability

## Version 1.12.35 (December 2025)
- Expanded Codemaps with chat, Mermaid diagrams, and Cascade suggestions
- Improved Cascade summarization
- MCP path and OAuth enhancements

## Version 1.12.33 (November 2025)
- Gemini 3 Pro preview model release

## Version 1.12.32 (November 2025)
- GPT-5.1 priority mode for guaranteed low-latency responses

## Version 1.12.31 (November 2025)
- GPT-5.1 and GPT-5.1-Codex models
- MCP improvements (loading indicators, selective refresh, extended timeout, error state recovery)
- Cascade hooks feature
- SWE 1.5 image support

## Version 1.12.28 (November 2025)
- Expanded Codemaps with codebase chat, Mermaid diagram generation, and AI suggestions
- Improved Cascade summarization

## Version 1.12.27 (November 2025)
- Falcon Alpha stealth model for agentic workflows

## Version 1.12.25 (November 2025)
- AGENTS.md support
- Fast Context feature with auto-toggle via CMD/Ctrl+Enter
- Auto-linting for Cascade
- Jupyter Notebook tool fixes

## Version 1.12.21 (November 2025)
- Fast Context subagent powered by SWE-grep for rapid code context retrieval

## Version 1.12.20 (November 2025)
- Fast Context with SWE-grep enabling 20x faster context discovery

## Version 1.12.18 (November 2025)
- Codemaps beta feature for codebase understanding and navigation

## Version 1.12.16 (November 2025)
- Claude Sonnet 4.5 model availability

## Version 1.12.12 (November 2025)
- Grok Code Fast 1 model for Pro and Teams users

## Version 1.12.8 (November 2025)
- GPT-5-Codex availability at no cost for paid users (limited time)

## Version 1.12.6 (November 2025)
- Queued messages feature
- Mermaid diagram rendering in Cascade
- Windsurf Browser deprecation notice

## Version 1.12.2 (October 2025)
- Grok Code Fast 1 model release with promotional pricing

## Version 1.11.5 (October 2025)
- GPT-5 suite (low, medium, high reasoning variants) free for limited time

## Version 1.12.1 (September 2025)
- DeepWiki integration for code symbol documentation
- Vibe and Replace AI find-replace functionality
- Tab autocomplete system redesign
- UI overhaul for Chat, Cascade, and home screens
- Dev Container support via remote SSH

## Version 1.12.0 (September 2025)
- Claude 4 Sonnet and Opus models via BYOK (Bring Your Own Anthropic Key)

## Version 1.11.1 (September 2025)
- Kimi K2 model availability

## Version 1.11.0 (September 2025)
- Voice input for Cascade
- Conversation @-mention feature
- Browser integration with @-mentions
- Planning Mode and Workflows for JetBrains
- MCP server support with Streamable HTTP transport and authentication
- Global `.codeiumignore` enforcement

## Version 1.10.3 (August 2025)
- Windsurf Browser with context sharing capabilities
- Image upload, code block, text, and web element screenshot support

## Version 1.10.1 (August 2025)
- Planning Mode with editable plan.md files
- Native terminal in Cascade panel

## Updated
2026-04-12
